mul_assoc, smul_add, add_smul]
        <;> ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [antipode_mul_distrib, antipode_mul_antidistrib]
        <;> abel_nf at * <;> simp_all [antipode_mul_distrib, antipode_mul_antidistrib]
        <;> norm_num at *
        <;> simp_all [antipode_mul_distrib, antipode_mul_antidistrib]
      })
m.swap

simp [comul_comp_antipode]
    · ext; simp [comul_part1]

ext a
      simp [antipode_mul_distrib, <;>
          (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
              (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
                (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
                  (try simp_all [R : Type u_1]
                    A : Type u_2]
                    [C : Type u_3]
                    [CommSemiring R]
                    [CommSemiring A]
                    [CommSemiring C]
                    [HopfAlgebra R A]
                    [HopfAlgebra R C]
                    [IsCocomm R C]
                  [instance : Coe (R) (A)]
                  [instance : Coe (R) (C)]
                  [instance : Coe (A) (C)]
                  [instance : Coe (C) (A)]
                )
              )
            )
          ]
      )
    <;>
      (try simp_all [antipode_mul_distrib, <;>
          (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
              (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
                (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
                  (try simp_all [R : Type u_1]
                    A : Type u_2]
                    [C : Type u_3]
                    [CommSemiring R]
                    [CommSemiring A]
                    [CommSemiring C]
                    [HopfAlgebra R A]
                    [HopfAlgebra R C]
                    [IsCocomm R C]
                  [instance : Coe (R) (A)]
                  [instance : Coe (R) (C)]
                  [instance : Coe (A) (C)]
                  [instance : Coe (C) (A)]
                )
              )
            )
          ]
      )
    <;>
      (try simp_all [antipode_mul_distrib, <;>
          (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
              (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
                (try simp_all [antipode_mul_a, <;>
                  (try simp_all [R : Type u_1]
                    A : Type u_2]
                    [C : Type u_3]
                    [CommSemiring R]
                    [CommSemiring A]
                    [CommSemiring C]
                    [HopfAlgebra R A]
                    [HopfAlgebra R C]
                    [IsCocomm R C]
                  [instance : Coe (R) (A)]
                  [instance : Coe (R) (C)]
                  [instance : Coe (A) (C)]
                  [instance : Coe (C) (A)]
                )
              )
            )
          ]
      )

ext
    <;> simp_all [Antipode, Convolution, CoCommutative, AntipodeInco]
    <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]) <;>
      (try simp_all [Antipode, Convolution, CoCommutative, AntipodeInco]) <;>
      (try simp_all [mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm])
    <;>
      (try nlinarith) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
